label: Create Order Request
description: The payload a customer submits when placing an order.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: The items being ordered. Must contain at least one item.
constraints: Each item must have a positive quantity

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: Where the order should be delivered.

fields.name: idempotencyKey
fields.description: Optional client-generated key to prevent duplicate order submissions on network retry.

label: Create Order Response
description: Returned to the customer after a successful order creation. Contains everything needed to complete payment on the client side.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The newly created order's stable identifier.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Always 'AWAITING_PAYMENT' at creation. The order awaits payment confirmation.

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent client_secret — passed to the browser's Stripe.js to complete the payment flow.

fields.name: reviewFlag
fields.description: True if the order was flagged for manual review due to value exceeding $10,000. Customer is informed their order is under review.

label: Order Record
description: The persisted order as it exists in the database. This is the source of truth for order state.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: Primary key.

fields.name: userId
fields.description: The customer who placed the order.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state in the order state machine.
constraints: Enum: AWAITING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | PENDING_REVIEW | PAYMENT_FAILED | SHIPPED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Snapshot of line items at order creation time. Immutable after creation.

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total order value in USD cents.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID associated with this order.

fields.name: reviewFlag
fields.description: True if order exceeds $10,000 and requires manual review. Immutable after creation.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: Delivery address snapshot.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: When the order was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: When the order was last updated.

label: Payment Completed Event
description: Kafka event published by the Payment Service when Stripe confirms a payment. Consumed by Order Service to transition an order to CONFIRMED.

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Unique event identifier for idempotency deduplication.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The order this payment applies to.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID — must match the one stored on the order.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Confirmed payment amount in USD cents.

fields.name: confirmedAt
fields.description: When Stripe confirmed the payment.

label: Payment Failed Event
description: Kafka event published by the Payment Service when Stripe reports a payment failure. Consumed by Order Service to transition an order to PAYMENT_FAILED.

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Unique event identifier for idempotency deduplication.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The order for which payment failed.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Human-readable reason code from Stripe.

fields.name: failedAt
fields.description: When the failure was reported.

label: Order Line Item
description: A single product in an order. Snapshotted at order creation — unit price and product name are captured as-of the moment of order, not looked up dynamically.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: The product being ordered.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units ordered.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit in USD cents, snapshotted at order time.

fields.name: productName
fields.description: Product name snapshotted at order time — not live from product catalog.
